title: Taiwan Stock Market Datasets
notes: Preferred source for historical OHLCV, institutional flows, margin, valuation, revenue and financial statement datasets where available.

title: 上市櫃公司公告與財務資訊

title: TWSE OpenAPI / Open Data
notes: Official exchange data used for market, company and announcement cross-checks.
